purpose: Classifies each CRO criterion as ASSET (standalone element) or ENSEMBLE (context-dependent, requires other elements to evaluate correctly). Also declares synergy groups: sets of criteria that must be co-evaluated (weak-one-compensated-by-strong-others principle).

ASSET.description: Criterion can be evaluated by looking at ONE element in isolation. Presence, size, format, count, technical metric. Score is deterministic from the element alone.

ENSEMBLE.description: Criterion requires MULTIPLE elements to be evaluated together. Context-dependent. A weak score on element A can be compensated by strong elements B, C, D in the same group. Score should be penalized only if the WHOLE ensemble fails.
examples: hero_01 (H1 only meaningful with subtitle + visual + CTA)

HERO_ENSEMBLE.description: Zone hero above-the-fold — H1, subtitle, visual, primary CTA, social proof, 5-sec test must be coherent together.
HERO_ENSEMBLE.compensation_rule: If H1 scores critical (0) but subtitle + CTA + visual convey the promise clearly, downgrade critical to ok. If all elements are weak, keep critical.

BENEFIT_FLOW.description: Message persuasion flow — benefits language, narrative, objection handling, tone across the page.
BENEFIT_FLOW.compensation_rule: Tone consistency (per_07) must be held; but a weak storytelling (per_02) can be compensated by strong benefit framing (per_01) on shorter pages.

SOCIAL_PROOF_STACK.description: Proofs + testimonials + authority signals — work together to build trust.
SOCIAL_PROOF_STACK.compensation_rule: 3+ testimonial formats compensate for absence of stats; verified authority logos compensate for weak VOC.

VISUAL_HIERARCHY.compensation_rule: Strong H1/H2/H3 hierarchy (ux_01) with mobile-friendly fonts (ux_05) compensates for dense rhythm (ux_02) on content-heavy pages.

COHERENCE_FULL.description: The 5-second test, target identifiability, scent matching, positioning — whole-page alignment.
COHERENCE_FULL.compensation_rule: coh_06 (single focus) is ASSET-level and stays isolated. The rest form an ensemble where strong positioning (coh_04) + clear target (coh_02) compensate for unclear 5-sec test (coh_01).

EMOTIONAL_DRIVERS.description: Psycho-emotional triggers that work together — risk reversal, urgency, anchoring, emotions.
EMOTIONAL_DRIVERS.compensation_rule: Over-indexing on urgency (psy_01) if paired with weak risk reversal (psy_04) = manipulation flag. Strong anchoring (psy_03) + clear risk reversal (psy_04) makes urgency optional.

TECH_FOUNDATION.description: Pure technical — each metric is ASSET (no compensation possible). CLS is CLS. HTTPS is HTTPS.

criteria.rationale: H1 quality only meaningful with subtitle, visual, and CTA. A weak H1 can be rescued by a powerful subtitle + visual.
Subtitle completes the H1. Evaluate together.
Primary CTA presence/placement ATF is checkable in isolation; but copy quality links to ensemble.
Hero visual must match promise (H1+subtitle). Cannot be evaluated alone.
Social proof presence ATF is asset-level (count/presence); but placement is ensemble.
5-second test + focus ratio evaluates the whole hero. Pure ensemble.
Benefit-over-feature requires evaluation of whole copy sequence.
Narrative arc is cross-section flow.
Objection handling spans FAQ + body + hero.
Presence of stats/case studies is quantifiable.
Count + format of testimonials is measurable.
FAQ presence and count are asset-level; quality links to ensemble.
Tone consistency requires sampling across page.
Jargon detection requires full-page context.
Awareness match Schwartz — traffic source × tone alignment is contextual.
Copy framework identification requires full-page view.
Benefit laddering needs depth across copy.
Hierarchy is relative across H1/H2/H3.
Rhythm is cross-section alternation.
Scan pattern evaluates whole page.
CTA repetition is counted per position.
Mobile touch target size is per-element metric.
Nav items count / focus is measurable in isolation.
Presence of micro-interactions is countable.
Checkout friction is flow-level.
5-sec test is by definition ensemble.
Target identifiability comes from copy + visual + context.
Scent match requires meta + hero + value prop alignment.
Positioning vs competitors needs full-page context.
Voice & Tone consistency across the page.
Single-focus counting is deterministic.
Positioning statement format check (text template).
Message hierarchy is cross-section.
Presence of a named mechanism is checkable in copy.
Urgency signals presence is countable; credibility is semi-ensemble.
Scarcity mentions are quantifiable.
Price anchoring requires comparison context.
Risk reversal (guarantees, trials) is presence-based.
Authority signals (logos, certifications) are countable.
Micro-engagement progression is flow-level.
Emotion activation checks language patterns across copy.
VOC verbatims presence is countable.
CLS, LCP, INP are pure metrics.
Semantic HTML tag counting.
SEO fundamentals are per-tag checks.
Tracking pixels presence check.
HTTPS, charset, viewport are single-attribute checks.
